Bash(python -c "
import fitz
doc = fitz.open\('C:/Users/Jacobo Molina/imecalibraciones-web/docs/Manual-identidad.pdf'\)
print\(f'Páginas: {len\(doc\)}'\)
for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    text = page.get_text\(\)
    if text.strip\(\):
        print\(f'--- PÁGINA {i+1} ---'\)
        print\(text[:3000]\)
    else:
        print\(f'--- PÁGINA {i+1} --- [sin texto / imagen]'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import pdfplumber
with pdfplumber.open\('C:/Users/Jacobo Molina/imecalibraciones-web/docs/Manual-identidad.pdf'\) as pdf:
    print\(f'Páginas: {len\(pdf.pages\)}'\)
    for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\):
        text = page.extract_text\(\)
        colors = page.extract_words\(\)
        print\(f'--- PÁGINA {i+1} ---'\)
        if text:
            print\(text[:2000]\)
        else:
            print\('[sin texto extraíble]'\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Jacobo Molina/imecalibraciones-web/assets/images/clientes" && python3 -c "
from PIL import Image
import os
files = sorted\(os.listdir\('.'\)\)
for f in files:
    try:
        img = Image.open\(f\)
        w, h = img.size
        ratio = round\(w/h, 2\)
        shape = 'cuadrado' if ratio < 1.3 else \('horizontal' if ratio < 3 else 'muy horizontal'\)
        print\(f'{f:<30} {w}x{h}  ratio={ratio}  [{shape}]'\)
    except: pass
")
